languages.text: "Взамен? Быть может... мы могли бы извлечь оставшийся прометий, что хранится за пределами улья, из чанов для подъема на орбиту. Но позвольте... Это никак не уменьшит наши грехи! Страдание и покаяние наш удел. И даже... Даже если бы мы хотели покинуть улей, до котлов с прометием не добраться. Меч занесен над Детьми Искупления, и имя ему — Погонщик Кошмаров".

traits.locale_text: "Взамен? Быть может... мы могли бы извлечь оставшийся прометиум, что хранится за пределами улья, из чанов для подъема на орбиту. Но позвольте... Это никак не уменьшит наши грехи! Страдание и покаяние наш удел. И даже... Даже если бы мы хотели покинуть улей, до котлов с прометиумом не добраться. Меч занесен над Детьми Искупления, и имя ему — Погонщик Кошмаров".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Взамен? Быть может... мы могли бы извлечь оставшийся прометий, что хранится за пределами улья, из чанов для подъема на орбиту. Но позвольте... Это никак не уменьшит наши грехи! Страдание и покаяние наш удел. И даже... Даже если бы мы хотели покинуть улей, до котлов с прометием не добраться. Меч занесен над Детьми Искупления, и имя ему — Погонщик Кошмаров".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "In return? Perhaps... We might extract the remaining promethium from the outside vats so it could be lifted into orbit. But I must say... This will not lighten the burden of our misdeeds! Our lot is to suffer and repent. And even... Even if we wanted to leave the hive, there is no way we could reach the promethium vats. A sword is hanging over Children of Redemption, and Nightmare Driver is its name."
languages.original_text: "Взамен? Быть может... мы могли бы извлечь оставшийся прометий, что хранится за пределами улья, из чанов для подъема на орбиту. Но позвольте... Это никак не уменьшит наши грехи! Страдание и покаяние наш удел. И даже... Даже если бы мы хотели покинуть улей, до котлов с прометием не добраться. Меч занесен над Детьми Искупления, и имя ему — Погонщик Кошмаров".

traits.locale_text: "In return? Perhaps... The Children might extract the remaining promethium from the outside vats so it could be lifted into orbit. But consider... This will not lighten the burden of our sins! Our lot is to suffer and repent. And even... Even if we wanted to leave the hive, there is no way we could reach the promethium vats. A sword is hanging over Children of Redemption, and Nightmare Driver is its name."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "In return? Perhaps... The Children might extract the remaining promethium from the outside vats so it could be lifted into orbit. But consider... This will not lighten the burden of our sins! Our lot is to suffer and repent. And even... Even if we wanted to leave the hive, there is no way we could reach the promethium vats. A sword is hanging over Children of Redemption, and Nightmare Driver is its name."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "In return? Perhaps... We might extract the remaining promethium from the outside vats so it could be lifted into orbit. But I must say... This will not lighten the burden of our misdeeds! Our lot is to suffer and repent. And even... Even if we wanted to leave the hive, there is no way we could reach the promethium vats. A sword is hanging over Children of Redemption, and Nightmare Driver is its name."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Als Gegenleistung? Vielleicht... Wir könnten das restliche Promethium aus den äußeren Behältern extrahieren, damit es in den Orbit gebracht werden kann. Aber ich muss sagen... Das wird die Last unserer Missetaten nicht erleichtern! Unser Los ist es, zu leiden und zu bereuen. Und selbst... Selbst wenn wir den Hive verlassen wollten, könnten wir die Promethium-Behälter nicht erreichen. Ein Schwert hängt über den Kindern der Erlösung, und sein Name ist Nightmare Driver."
languages.original_text: "In return? Perhaps... We might extract the remaining promethium from the outside vats so it could be lifted into orbit. But I must say... This will not lighten the burden of our misdeeds! Our lot is to suffer and repent. And even... Even if we wanted to leave the hive, there is no way we could reach the promethium vats. A sword is hanging over Children of Redemption, and Nightmare Driver is its name."

languages.text: "En retour ? Peut-être... Nous pourrions extraire le prométhium restant des cuves extérieures pour le mettre en orbite. Mais je dois dire... Cela n'allégera pas le fardeau de nos méfaits ! Notre lot est de souffrir et de nous repentir. Et même... Même si nous voulions quitter la ruche, nous ne pourrions pas atteindre les cuves de prométhium. Une épée est suspendue au-dessus des Enfants de la Rédemption, et son nom est Conducteur de Cauchemar."
languages.original_text: "In return? Perhaps... We might extract the remaining promethium from the outside vats so it could be lifted into orbit. But I must say... This will not lighten the burden of our misdeeds! Our lot is to suffer and repent. And even... Even if we wanted to leave the hive, there is no way we could reach the promethium vats. A sword is hanging over Children of Redemption, and Nightmare Driver is its name."

languages.text: "作为回报？也许...我们可以从外面的大桶里提取剩余的钷 这样就可以把它送入轨道了但我必须说...这并不能减轻我们的罪孽我们的命运就是受苦和忏悔甚至...即使我们想离开蜂巢 我们也不可能到达钷储槽"救赎之子 "的头上悬着一把剑 它的名字叫 "噩梦驾驶员"
languages.original_text: "In return? Perhaps... We might extract the remaining promethium from the outside vats so it could be lifted into orbit. But I must say... This will not lighten the burden of our misdeeds! Our lot is to suffer and repent. And even... Even if we wanted to leave the hive, there is no way we could reach the promethium vats. A sword is hanging over Children of Redemption, and Nightmare Driver is its name."

languages.text: ¿"A cambio"? Quizás... Podríamos extraer el prometio restante de las cubas exteriores para ponerlo en órbita. Pero debo decir... ¡Esto no aligerará la carga de nuestras fechorías! Nuestro destino es sufrir y arrepentirnos. E incluso... Incluso si quisiéramos dejar la colmena, no hay forma de que pudiéramos llegar a las cubas de prometio. Una espada pende sobre Hijos de la Redención, y Conductor de Pesadillas es su nombre".
languages.original_text: "In return? Perhaps... We might extract the remaining promethium from the outside vats so it could be lifted into orbit. But I must say... This will not lighten the burden of our misdeeds! Our lot is to suffer and repent. And even... Even if we wanted to leave the hive, there is no way we could reach the promethium vats. A sword is hanging over Children of Redemption, and Nightmare Driver is its name."

languages.text: 「お返し？おそらく...残りのプロメチウムを外槽から抽出し、軌道に乗せることができるかもしれない。しかし...我々の悪行の重荷は 軽くならない我々の運命は 苦しみと悔恨だそして...ハイブを離れたくとも、プロメチウム貯蔵庫にたどり着くことはできない。贖罪の子供たちには剣がかけられている。ナイトメアドライバーがその名だ。"
languages.original_text: "In return? Perhaps... We might extract the remaining promethium from the outside vats so it could be lifted into orbit. But I must say... This will not lighten the burden of our misdeeds! Our lot is to suffer and repent. And even... Even if we wanted to leave the hive, there is no way we could reach the promethium vats. A sword is hanging over Children of Redemption, and Nightmare Driver is its name."

languages.text: "Karşılığında mı? Belki de. Kalan prometyumu dışarıdaki fıçılardan çıkarabiliriz, böylece yörüngeye kaldırılabilir. Ama söylemeliyim ki. Bu, kabahatlerimizin yükünü hafifletmeyecek! Bizim kaderimiz acı çekmek ve tövbe etmek. Ve hatta. Kovandan ayrılmak istesek bile, prometyum fıçılarına ulaşmamızın bir yolu yok. Kefaretin Çocukları'nın üzerinde bir kılıç sallanıyor ve adı da Kâbus Sürücü."
languages.original_text: "In return? Perhaps... We might extract the remaining promethium from the outside vats so it could be lifted into orbit. But I must say... This will not lighten the burden of our misdeeds! Our lot is to suffer and repent. And even... Even if we wanted to leave the hive, there is no way we could reach the promethium vats. A sword is hanging over Children of Redemption, and Nightmare Driver is its name."
